news.title: Jayson Tatum Debuts
news.text: Jordan Brand's signature model for the past few years, Jayson Tatum will be dawning the Air Jordan 37 this season before potentially getting his first signature sneaker.

news.title: Bro’s Nike Zoom Freak 4
news.text: The upcoming take on the Zoom Freak 4 draws inspiration from Thanksgiving, using orange and brown for a holiday vibe.

news.title: Hoka Updates the Speedgoat
news.text: Hoka unveils the Speedgoat 5 'Fiesta', pairing Megagrip traction with a vibrant trail-ready palette for spring adventures.

news.title: ASICS Celebrates 30 Years of Gel-Kayano
news.text: ASICS marks three decades of stability with the Gel-Kayano 30, introducing PureGEL cushioning and a refreshed support system.
